overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Zero Dawn featuring the protagonist Aloy running through a scenic desert canyon during golden hour. The character traverses a shallow stream bed, passes distinctive layered rock formations, and transitions into swimming through deeper water.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert canyon stream bed with distant rock spire

agents.ego_description: running through shallow stream bed toward a distinctive tall rock formation in the distance

entered.detail: tall pointed rock formation silhouetted against the bright sky
shallow water stream running through the canyon floor

segments.scene_description: Aloy runs through a shallow desert stream bed surrounded by sparse vegetation and dead trees. The camera follows from behind as she approaches a distinctive tall rock spire in the distance, with layered canyon walls visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon path with layered rock formation and wildflowers

events.description: vegetation changes to dense yellow wildflowers on the right bank

agents.ego_description: running past the large layered rock formation while navigating the stream path

entered.detail: large flat-topped rock with distinct horizontal sedimentary layers
dense patches of yellow flowering plants
wider waterway running parallel to the path

segments.scene_description: The character passes a massive layered rock formation on the left while the path becomes lined with yellow wildflowers. The stream channel widens into a more defined waterway on the right as Aloy continues running through the canyon.

events.description: character enters deep water and transitions from running to swimming
character submerges completely below water surface

agents.ego_description: diving into deep water and swimming forward through the canyon pool

entered.detail: deep water pool allowing full swimming immersion
rock formation with mushroom-like cap on top

segments.scene_description: Aloy enters a deep pool of water, transitioning from running to swimming as the camera follows her movement. The water becomes deep enough to swim, with distinctive mushroom-shaped rock formations visible on the right bank as she progresses through the canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desert canyon that transforms from a dry stream bed into a deep swimming pool. It begins with Aloy running through a shallow waterway surrounded by sparse vegetation and dead trees, moving toward a distant rock spire beneath towering canyon walls. As she progresses, the path becomes lined with yellow wildflowers and the stream channel widens, passing a massive layered rock formation on the left. The scene then shifts as the terrain dips, causing Aloy to transition from running to swimming in a deep pool of water. Finally, the camera follows her through the waterway, passing distinctive mushroom-shaped rock formations on the right bank.
